name: Brass Fittings
description: Premium brass pipe fittings including elbows, tees, couplings, unions, and reducers for plumbing, HVAC, and industrial applications.

name: Brass Valves
description: High-performance brass valves including ball, gate, check, globe, and needle valves for precise flow control.

name: Brass Connectors
description: Versatile brass connectors including hose barbs, push-to-connect fittings, quick-connect couplings, and adapters.

name: Brass Fasteners
description: Corrosion-resistant brass fasteners including hex bolts, machine screws, nuts, washers, and threaded rods.

name: Brass Inserts
description: Precision brass threaded inserts for plastic and wood applications — knurled, heat-set, ultrasonic, and expansion types.

name: Brass Turned Parts
description: CNC precision-turned brass components including shafts, spacers, dowel pins, bushings, and contact pins.

name: Brass Plumbing Components
description: Brass plumbing components including compression valves, P-trap parts, floor drains, shower connectors, and tap spindles.

name: Brass Electrical Components
description: Brass electrical components including cable glands, terminal connectors, earth rod clamps, and switchgear contacts.
